steps.title: Fastest path: use the function table
steps.content: Enter the function in Desmos or a calculator table and scan for the row with the output named in the question. The input that works gives A, 4. This is just a table lookup, and the arithmetic below confirms the same value.

steps.title: Backsolving - testing Choice A — 4 (4)
steps.content:
Backsolving - testing Choice A — 4 (4):
$$f(4) = 7(2\cdot4 + 3) = 7(8+3) = 7\cdot11 = 77$$
Since 77 = 77, Choice A — 4 works. That matches Choice A — 4.
